title: Gojo Satoru Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of the famous character Gojo Satoru from "Jujutsu Kaisen"
body:
This is a sky overlay of the famous character Gojo Satoru from the anime Jujutsu Kaisen. The sky overlay consists of mainly a cloudy sky that looks blueish and the sky has sunlight in it. Not to mention that Gojo is in the south part of the sky. 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will not be able to see it.**

If you want to see more like this join my discord: https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF

![Gojo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c6095d8017174addf17f30df854c3456ba2562_0.webp)
